match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: cinematic still in modern social-first product photography style showing SCARLETT in casual beach attire reaching her hand across a white vanity surface to lift the coral lipstick tube from its open box, fingers tensed mid-grasp as the vibrant bullet begins to twist upward under directional sunlight, open tote bag resting on the studio floor nearby, clean minimal interior with bright window light casting crisp natural shadows across the white surface and glossy tube, high-key airy atmosphere with true-to-life color, shallow depth of field emphasizing the tactile moment of contact, eye-level slightly overhead framing with natural micro-movement energy and crisp whites against the neutral palette

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: INT. VANITY - DAY - White vanity with bright window light
    - Image 4 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim glossy coral lipstick tube with metallic body and extended vibrant bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
